summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing for Sakuku (Indonesian finance app). 26/26 backend pytest cases passed (auth, transactions, budgets, goals, stats, voice parser, data isolation, 401 protection). Frontend e2e flows verified: login, dashboard summary cards, sidebar nav, voice mic modal, add-transaction dialog persisting to backend with toast confirmation, budgets/goals/reports pages render. Indonesian text and httpOnly cookie auth working. App-wide integration is healthy.

minor.issue: FastAPI on_event('startup'/'shutdown') is deprecated in favor of lifespan handlers. Works fine but emits deprecation warnings.

issues: Form uses native HTML <select> and <input type='date'> instead of shadcn Select / Calendar components. The deadline picker on Goals dialog and date picker on transactions show the browser default mm/dd/yyyy picker which doesn't match the modern theme and is inconsistent across browsers. Recommend using shadcn Select and Calendar/Popover for a consistent experience.

Recharts emit width/height(-1) warnings in console at first paint due to ResponsiveContainer being measured before parent has a size. Cosmetic; charts render correctly on second tick. Consider wrapping chart containers with explicit min-height or using aspect ratio to silence warnings.

A 401 from /api/auth/me is logged in console on initial load (expected because the app calls /me to bootstrap). Consider suppressing the 401 from console (e.g., not logging when status===401 on initial check) for cleaner DX.

action_items: (Optional, design polish) Replace native <select> in AddTransactionDialog & BudgetsPage with shadcn Select for consistent theming.
(Optional, design polish) Replace native <input type='date'> in GoalsPage and AddTransactionDialog with shadcn Calendar/Popover (Date picker).
(Optional) Migrate FastAPI deprecated on_event hooks to lifespan handler.
(Optional) Suppress 401 console error for the initial /api/auth/me bootstrap check on Login/public pages.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 595-line file. Consider splitting into routers/auth.py, routers/transactions.py, routers/budgets.py, routers/goals.py, services/voice_parser.py for maintainability before adding more features.
JWT secret is committed in /app/backend/.env (acceptable for local dev only). Ensure prod injects via secret manager.
voice_parse endpoint requires auth but the parser logic is purely text->dict; that's fine, just noting it adds DB user lookup overhead per call.
stats_summary loads all user transactions twice (current month + all-time). For users with large histories, consider an aggregation pipeline or caching.
Indexes are good (users.email unique, transactions(user_id,date)). Consider adding budgets compound index (user_id, category, month) since there is an upsert on those keys.
test_credentials: budi@test.com / rahasia123 (works; auto-registers if missing in test fixture)
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed transactions/budgets/goals and clean them up. A few TEST_food/TEST_gaji transactions for Jan 2026 remain in DB from a previous run (verified visible in dashboard recent activity) - safe to leave or main agent can clean if desired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend uses httpOnly access_token cookie (samesite=none, secure=true). Tests use requests.Session() to retain cookie across calls. AddTransactionDialog uses native <select> for category - in Playwright use page.select_option('[data-testid=tx-category-select]', label='Makanan') instead of [role=option]. Voice modal opens correctly via [data-testid=voice-mic-button] -> [data-testid=voice-modal]. Date picker is native HTML.
rca of the issue: No critical bugs found. All design notes are polish/optional improvements.
